s: In 2019, Travis Demeritte suited up for DET as a hitter. Key numbers: AVG 0.225, OPS 0.630, HR 3, RBI 10, WAR -0.700.
In 2020, Travis Demeritte suited up for DET as a two_way. Key numbers: AVG 0.172, OPS 0.480, HR 0, RBI 4, WAR -0.200.
Changed teams after the previous season (DET -> ATL).
In 2022, Travis Demeritte suited up for ATL as a hitter. Key numbers: AVG 0.213, OPS 0.597, HR 3, RBI 6, WAR -0.500. Notable context: Joined ATL.
